message:
feat(pt-math): Add log-domain posterior normalization utilities

Add posterior.rs module providing numerically stable Bayesian inference
helpers that operate entirely in log-domain to avoid underflow:

- normalize_log_probs(): Normalizes unnormalized log-probabilities so they
  sum to 1 in probability space. Uses log_sum_exp for stable normalization
  constant computation.

- posterior_probs(): Converts normalized log posteriors to probability
  vectors via exponentiation.

- log_odds(): Computes log-odds between two classes as simple difference
  of log posteriors - numerically stable by construction.

- stable_softmax(): Convenience function combining normalization and
  exponentiation in one call with proper edge case handling.

All functions handle edge cases robustly:
- Empty inputs return empty outputs
- NaN propagation is explicit
- NEG_INFINITY (zero probability) handled correctly

Includes comprehensive test coverage with shift-invariance and sum-to-one
property tests.

Note: Module not yet exported from mod.rs - wiring to be done separately.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
